content_body:
I needed a last minute place to shelter away from the city, and this cabin did not disappoint. The booking process was easy and the property managers were very responsive and helpful from the beginning. I loved it so much that I decided to extend another day, and that process was easy as well.

The place was clean, stocked with towels, and you truly felt isolated which was the goal.

I definitely hope to return some day soon!
title: Did Not Disappoint!
